architecture: Separately deployed local service behind a narrow Jarvis adapter. Do not copy source into proprietary core without an approved licence decision.
grant_rules: Grant one sensor and one bounded purpose at a time.
Require explicit user approval and a visible active indicator.
Use allowlisted applications, windows, devices and time limits.
Exclude password managers, banking, health portals, private messages, authentication screens and secret stores.
Redact detected credentials, payment data and sensitive personal information before model access.
Store no raw sensor data by default; retain only minimal evidence-linked derived events when approved.
Use local models for restricted data unless an approved private provider route exists.
Provide immediate stop, revoke and purge controls.
forbidden: background camera or microphone activation without a visible indicator
capture of credentials, MFA, private keys, recovery phrases or payment data
monitoring another person without lawful authority and consent
production credential or unrestricted filesystem access
production_gate: Privacy threat model, legal/licence review, isolated sandbox, user acceptance and explicit deployment approval.
rollback: Stop and remove the separate sensor service, revoke permissions, purge transient data and disable the Jarvis adapter feature flag.
